case_title: NORTH STAR CAPITAL ACQUISITION LLC VS. CHARLES A. BYES et al

docket_entries.description: CRC 3.740 REVIEW
CRC 3.740 REVIEW

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTH STAR CAPITAL ACQUISITION LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BYES, CHARLES A. $1,208.35 PRINCIPAL, $278.37 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,486.72, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO BUTTE COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,187.38 AS TO DEFENDANT BYES, CHARLES A.

DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF NORTH STAR CAPITAL ACQUISITION LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BYES, CHARLES A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-19-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $41.91 INTEREST, $45.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTH STAR CAPITAL ACQUISITION LLC
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B); VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTH STAR CAPITAL ACQUISITION LLC
CRC 3.740 REVIEW
DECLARATION EVAN DAILY FILED RE: UNAVAILABILITY OF ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT; COMPUTATION OF INTEREST; AND NOTICE PURSUANT TO CCP 1033(B)(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTH STAR CAPITAL ACQUISITION LLC
